topics.title: New Package Promotion
topics.summary: The openapi-python package is being promoted on npmx.dev, encouraging users to support it with likes. This initiative aims to increase visibility and adoption of the package within the developer community.

topics.title: Event Recap: npmx London
topics.summary: A recap of the npmx London event is shared, highlighting experiences and insights from participants. This post serves to engage the community and reflect on the event's impact.
